title: What Is AI, Really?
summary: AI, machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI are often mixed together. Learn what each one means and how they fit inside each other.

context.headline: One word, four layers
context.description: AI is an umbrella term, and much of the confusion comes from mixing up its layers. Machine learning sits inside AI, deep learning sits inside machine learning, and generative AI is one modern application area built largely on deep learning. Once you see that nesting, the field becomes easier to interpret.
context.when: From 1950s research labs to the tools you use today
